Article.description: Article Component - A content card with a heading and one or more body paragraphs. Use this for article intros, about-us prose, or any long-form text section.

props.name: id
props.description: Optional anchor id for in-page links (e.g. href="#about")

props.name: badge
props.description: Optional small badge label shown above the heading (e.g. "Featured", "News")

props.name: heading
props.description: Section heading

props.name: subheading
props.description: Optional subtitle displayed directly below the heading

props.name: paragraphs
props.description: One or more paragraphs of body text

props.name: fontFamily
props.description: Primary font family for paragraphs: 'sans' (default), 'serif', or 'mono'

props.name: image
props.description: Optional full-width image

props.name: images
props.description: Optional array of images for split layout (alternative to single image)

props.name: imagePosition
props.description: Where to render the image relative to the text: 'top' (above heading), 'bottom' (default, below paragraphs), 'left' or 'right' (side-by-side split layout)

props.name: imageCircular
props.description: If true, renders image as circular and overlapping the top of the card

props.name: imageAlign
props.description: Horizontal alignment for circular images: 'left' (default), 'center', or 'right'

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Background color for the outer section (Tailwind class, e.g., 'bg-gray-100')

props.name: textColor
props.description: Text color for heading and paragraphs (Tailwind class, e.g., 'text-white'). Overrides the default dark-on-light palette — use when backgroundColor is dark.

props.name: headingColor
props.description: Override color for the heading only (Tailwind class, e.g., 'text-pink-500'). Takes precedence over textColor for the heading element.

props.name: badgeColor
props.description: Override color for the badge label (Tailwind class, e.g., 'text-red-700'). Defaults to 'text-indigo-500'.

props.name: card
props.description: If true, renders paragraphs inside a raised card

props.name: cardBackgroundColor
props.description: Background color for the raised card (Tailwind class, e.g., 'bg-gray-100'). Defaults to 'bg-white' when card=true.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Max width constraint (Tailwind class, e.g., 'max-w-3xl')

props.name: layout
props.description: Section layout variant: 'default' (card + maxWidth), 'centered' (centered text, no card), 'wide' (full-width, no maxWidth constraint), 'split' (two-column: text on left, map/image on right)

props.name: action
props.description: Optional CTA button rendered below the text

props.name: actions
props.type: Array<{ label: string; href: string; variant?: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'success'; }>
props.description: Multiple CTA buttons rendered below the text

props.name: actionAlign
props.description: Alignment for action buttons: 'left' (default), 'center', or 'right'

props.name: sidebar
props.type: { title?: string; links?: Array<{ label: string; href: string; }>; sections?: Array<{ title: string; content?: string; links?: Array<{ label: string; href: string; }> }>; image?: { src: string; alt: string; }; content?: string; backgroundColor?: string; textColor?: string; }
props.description: Optional sidebar with a title and list of links; renders a two-column layout (position controlled by sidebarPosition)

props.name: sidebarPosition
props.description: Which side to render the sidebar: 'left' (default) or 'right'

props.name: sidebarBackgroundColor
props.description: Background color for the sidebar (Tailwind class, e.g., 'bg-yellow-800'). Overrides sidebar.backgroundColor when present.

props.name: backgroundImage
props.description: Background image URL — creates a full-cover background with a subtle overlay

props.name: map
props.type: { src: string; width?: string; height?: string; heading?: string; }
props.description: Optional embedded iframe (e.g., Google Maps embed or YouTube video); rendered below paragraphs, or in the right column when layout='split'

props.name: videoEmbed
props.description: YouTube or other iframe embed URL; rendered as a responsive 16:9 iframe below the paragraphs

props.name: bulletPoints
props.description: Optional bulleted list of items rendered after paragraphs

props.name: align
props.description: Text alignment: 'left' (default), 'center', or 'right' — mirrors Hero.align

Banner.description: Banner Component - A horizontal bar for notifications, secondary CTAs, or brand highlighting.

props.name: id
props.description: Optional anchor id for in-page links (e.g. href="#promo")

props.name: text
props.description: The text content of the banner

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Optional background color (Tailwind class)

props.name: textColor
props.description: Optional text color (Tailwind class)

props.name: action
props.description: Optional link/CTA

props.name: sticky
props.description: If true, the banner is fixed to the top of the viewport

props.name: fixedPosition
props.description: Position for fixed banners: 'top' (default) or 'bottom'

props.name: align
props.description: Text alignment: 'left', 'center' (default), or 'right'

Calendar.description: Calendar Component - Displays a grid of events or a schedule.

props.name: id
props.description: Optional anchor id for in-page links (e.g. href="#events")

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Background color for the section (Tailwind class, e.g. 'bg-black')

props.name: textColor
props.description: Base text color applied to the whole section (Tailwind class, e.g. 'text-white'). Use when backgroundColor is dark.

props.name: heading
props.description: Section heading

props.name: subheading
props.description: Supporting description

props.name: align
props.description: Text alignment for heading and subheading: 'center' (default), 'left', or 'right'

props.name: events
props.type: Array<{ date: string; title: string; description?: string; time?: string; }>
props.description: Array of events

ContactForm.description: ContactForm Component - Property-Driven Architecture Inspired by Fulldev UI for maximum AI-compatibility.

props.name: id
props.description: Optional anchor id for in-page links (e.g. href="#reservation")

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Tailwind background-color utility applied to the section (e.g. "bg-pink-50", "bg-white")

props.name: textColor
props.description: Tailwind text-color utility applied as the base text color (e.g. "text-white"). Use when backgroundColor is dark.

props.name: backgroundImage
props.description: Background image URL — creates a full-cover background with a subtle overlay

props.name: card
props.description: If true (default), wraps the form in a raised card container

props.name: cardBackgroundColor
props.description: Background color for the card container (Tailwind class, e.g., 'bg-gray-50', 'bg-white'). Only applied when card=true.

props.name: buttonLabel
props.description: Label text for the submit button (e.g. "Send", "Submit", "Get in touch")

props.name: align
props.description: Text alignment for heading and subheading: 'left' (default), 'center', or 'right'

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Max width constraint for the form container (Tailwind class, e.g., 'max-w-sm', 'max-w-md')

props.name: fullHeight
props.description: If true, the form section takes up at least the full height of the screen (useful with backgroundImage)

props.name: sidebar
props.type: { title?: string; content?: string; address?: string[]; phone?: string; email?: string; }

props.name: fields
props.type: Array<{ label: string; type: 'text' | 'email' | 'textarea' | 'password' | 'select' | 'date' | 'time' | 'number'; required?: boolean; placeholder?: string; options?: string[]; }>
props.description: Options for select field type

props.name: image
props.description: Optional image shown in the right column when layout='split'

props.name: id
props.description: Optional anchor id for in-page links (e.g. href="#features")

props.name: layout
props.description: Layout variant: 'grid' for multi-column card grid (default), 'list' for full-width stacked rows

props.name: backgroundImage
props.description: Background image URL — creates a full-cover background behind the features grid

props.name: textColor
props.description: Base text color applied to heading, subheading, and feature titles/descriptions (Tailwind class, e.g. 'text-white'). Use when backgroundColor is dark.

props.name: headingColor
props.description: Override color for the section heading only (Tailwind class, e.g. 'text-yellow-600'). Takes precedence over textColor for the h2 element.

props.name: align
props.description: Text alignment for the section header and feature card content: 'center' (default), 'left', or 'right'

props.name: action
props.description: Optional section-level CTA button rendered below the features grid

props.name: features
props.type: Array<{ title: string; description: string; icon?: string; image?: string; backgroundColor?: string; headingColor?: string; action?: { label: string; href: string; variant?: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'success'; }; }>
props.description: Optional CTA button shown below the description

Footer.description: Footer Component - A site footer with links and information. The template already renders an automatic site-wide footer from settings.yaml on every page; when you add this <Footer> section to a page, also set `hideFooter: true` in that page's frontmatter so your footer replaces the automatic one.

props.name: id
props.description: Optional id for anchor links

props.name: columns
props.type: Array<{ title: string; links?: Array<{ label: string; href: string; }>; text?: string[]; }>
props.description: Plain text lines rendered as paragraphs (e.g. address, phone, email)

props.name: logo
props.description: Optional logo image displayed next to siteName

props.name: siteName
props.description: Site name or logo text

props.name: description
props.description: Short description

props.name: copyright
props.description: Copyright text

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Tailwind background color class

props.name: textColor
props.description: Tailwind text color class

props.name: fixedPosition
props.description: If true, the footer is fixed to the bottom of the viewport

props.name: newsletter
props.type: { heading?: string; placeholder?: string; buttonLabel?: string; }
props.description: Optional newsletter subscribe form rendered as the last column

props.name: action
props.description: Optional CTA button rendered in the bottom copyright bar

props.name: align
props.description: Text alignment for footer content: 'left' (default), 'center', or 'right'

props.name: linkColor
props.description: Text color for footer links (Tailwind class, e.g., 'text-pink-500')

props.name: id
props.description: Optional anchor id for in-page links (e.g. href="#gallery")

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Background color for the section (Tailwind class, e.g. 'bg-gray-100')

props.name: textColor
props.description: Text color for heading and subheading (Tailwind class, e.g. 'text-white'). Use when backgroundColor is dark.

props.name: headingColor
props.description: Specific heading color override (Tailwind class, e.g. 'text-pink-500'). Takes precedence over textColor for the heading.

props.name: sidebar
props.type: { title?: string; content?: string; image?: { src: string; alt: string; }; links?: Array<{ label: string; href: string; }>; action?: { label: string; href: string; }; }
props.description: Optional sidebar content

props.name: align
props.description: Text alignment for heading and subheading: 'center' (default), 'left', or 'right' — mirrors Hero.align

props.name: backgroundImage
props.description: Background image URL — creates a full-cover background with a subtle overlay

props.name: action
props.description: Optional CTA button rendered below the image grid

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Max width constraint (Tailwind class, e.g., 'max-w-3xl')

props.name: images
props.type: Array<{ src: string; alt: string; caption?: string; title?: string; description?: string; artist?: string; overlayText?: string; overlayPosition?: 'center' | 'top' | 'bottom'; action?: { label: string; href: string; variant?: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'success'; }; }>

Header.description: Header Component - A horizontal header with logo on the left and contact info on the right.

props.name: logo
props.type: { src: string; alt?: string; size?: string; }
props.description: Optional logo image shown on the left side

props.name: siteName
props.description: Brand name rendered as bold text on the left when no logo is provided

props.name: heading
props.description: Main heading text displayed prominently (e.g., "Welcome to Tech Startup")

props.name: image
props.description: Optional image displayed alongside the site name (e.g. school emblem, badge)

props.name: paragraphs
props.description: Body paragraphs displayed below the heading

props.name: contactInfo
props.description: Contact information displayed on the right side

props.name: cta
props.description: Optional call-to-action button shown on the right side

props.name: links
props.description: Navigation links rendered as a horizontal nav bar

props.name: linkColor
props.description: Text color for navigation links (Tailwind class, e.g., 'text-yellow-500')

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Background color for the header (Tailwind class)

props.name: backgroundGradient
props.description: Background gradient for the header (e.g., 'from-purple-500 to-pink-500' for use with bg-gradient-to-r)

props.name: textColor
props.description: Text color for the header (Tailwind class)

props.name: showSearch
props.description: Whether to show a search input in the header

props.name: searchPlaceholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the search input

props.name: searchButtonLabel
props.description: Label for the search submit button (shown when showSearch is true)

props.name: backgroundImage
props.description: Background image URL — creates a full-cover background with optional overlay

props.name: minHeight
props.description: Min height for the header when using backgroundImage (e.g., 'h-64')

props.name: subheading
props.description: Optional subtitle displayed below the site name or heading

props.name: align
props.description: Text/content alignment within the header: 'left' (default), 'center', or 'right'

props.name: fixedTop
props.description: If true, header is fixed to the top of the viewport

props.name: loginForm
props.type: { usernameLabel?: string; usernamePlaceholder?: string; passwordLabel?: string; passwordPlaceholder?: string; buttonLabel?: string; buttonColor?: string; }
props.description: Optional login form displayed on the right side

props.name: showHamburger
props.description: If true, shows a hamburger menu button on the right side

props.name: imageCircular
props.description: If true, renders the image as circular (rounded-full)

props.name: logoAlign
props.description: Logo horizontal alignment: 'left' (default), 'center', or 'right'

props.name: imageAlign
props.description: Horizontal alignment for images: 'left' (default), 'center', or 'right'

props.name: selectOptions
props.description: Optional select dropdown options displayed in header

props.name: selectLabel
props.description: Label for the select dropdown

Hero.description: Hero Component - The primary visual hook at the top of a page. Use this for high-impact messaging and primary calls to action.

props.name: id
props.description: Optional ID for anchor linking

props.name: heading
props.description: The main large title (e.g., "Transform Your Business"). Omit for image-only hero sections.

props.name: subheading
props.description: Supporting text below the heading

props.name: mono
props.description: If true, uses monospace font for the subheading

props.name: fontFamily
props.description: Primary font family for heading

props.name: fontWeight
props.description: Font weight for heading

props.name: badge
props.description: A small label shown above the heading

props.name: logo
props.type: { src: string; alt?: string; size?: string; circular?: boolean; }
props.description: Optional logo shown above everything

props.name: actions
props.type: Array<{ label: string; href: string; variant?: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'success'; }>
props.description: Array of CTA buttons

props.name: cta
props.description: Optional single CTA button (alternative to actions)

props.name: action
props.description: Optional CTA button rendered below the text (alternative to cta)

props.name: align
props.description: Text alignment: 'center' (default), 'left' or 'right'

props.name: layout
props.description: Layout style: 'split' (side-by-side) or 'stacked' (vertical)

props.name: fullHeight
props.description: If true, the section will take up at least the full height of the screen

props.name: minHeight
props.description: Tailwind min-height class to set a custom minimum height (e.g., 'min-h-[600px]', 'min-h-96'). Ignored when fullHeight is true.

props.name: showSearch
props.description: If true, show a large search bar

props.name: searchPlaceholder
props.description: Search bar placeholder text

props.name: searchFields
props.description: Custom search fields for multi-input search forms

props.name: searchButtonLabel
props.description: Search form button label

props.name: image
props.description: Main visual image

props.name: images
props.description: Array of images for gallery/carousel layout (alternative to single image)

props.name: backgroundImage
props.description: Background image URL (creates a full-cover background with overlay)

props.name: backgroundVideo
props.description: Background video URL (creates a full-cover background video with overlay)

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Background color (Tailwind class, e.g., 'bg-indigo-600')

props.name: headingColor
props.description: Optional heading color (Tailwind class)

props.name: subheadingColor
props.description: Optional subheading color (Tailwind class)

props.name: textColor
props.description: Base text color applied to the whole section (Tailwind class, e.g., 'text-white'). Use when backgroundColor is dark and you want all text to inherit a light color.

props.name: backgroundGradient
props.description: Background gradient for the hero (e.g., 'from-green-400 via-green-500 to-purple-500' for use with bg-gradient-to-r)

props.name: videoEmbed
props.description: YouTube or other iframe embed URL; rendered as a responsive 16:9 iframe in place of the image

props.name: videoSrc
props.description: Direct video file URL (mp4/webm); rendered as a native <video> element with controls in place of the image

props.name: videoAutoplay
props.description: If true, the videoSrc plays automatically (muted, looping, no controls) — use for ambient/background-style split-panel videos

props.name: audioSrc
props.description: Direct audio file URL (mp3/wav/ogg); rendered as a native <audio> element with controls

props.name: imagePosition
props.description: Where to render the image relative to the text in stacked layout: 'top' (above heading) or 'bottom' (default, below content). 'left'/'right' act as aliases for layout='split'.

props.name: showSidebar
props.description: If true, renders a narrow sidebar panel on the left side of the hero

props.name: sidebarBackgroundColor
props.description: Background color class for the sidebar panel (e.g., 'bg-white bg-opacity-75')

props.name: sidebarContent
props.type: Array<{ heading?: string; items?: string[]; text?: string; }>
props.description: Right-side content panel for split layout: supports headings, lists, and text blocks

props.name: newsletter
props.type: { heading?: string; placeholder?: string; buttonLabel?: string; }
props.description: Optional newsletter signup card rendered on the right side of a split-layout hero (e.g. heading, email input, subscribe button)

props.name: sidebar
props.type: { title?: string; content?: string; linksTitle?: string; links?: Array<{ label: string; href: string; }>; image?: { src: string; alt: string; }; }
props.description: Left-side sidebar for split layout: supports headings, paragraph content, and links

props.name: sidebarPosition
props.description: Which side to render the sidebar: 'left' (default) or 'right'

props.name: sidebarContentBackgroundColor
props.description: Background color for the right-side content panel (Tailwind class)

props.name: paragraphs
props.description: Additional body paragraphs rendered below the subheading

props.name: bulletPoints
props.description: Bulleted list items rendered below paragraphs (or subheading if no paragraphs)

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Tailwind max-width class to constrain the inner content container (e.g., 'max-w-3xl', 'max-w-4xl'). Defaults to 'max-w-6xl'.

props.name: imageCircular
props.description: If true, renders the hero image as a circle (rounded-full). Useful for profile/avatar-style hero images.

props.name: imageAlign
props.description: Horizontal alignment for circular images: 'left' (default), 'center', or 'right'

props.name: card
props.description: If true, wraps the text content in a semi-transparent card panel (e.g., for a hero with a background image)

props.name: cardBackgroundColor
props.description: Tailwind background/style classes for the card panel (default: 'bg-white bg-opacity-75')

props.name: links
props.description: Inline navigation links rendered as an overlay nav bar across the top of the hero

props.name: siteName
props.description: Brand/site name shown on the left side of the overlay nav bar (used alongside links)

props.name: linkColor
props.description: Text color for navigation links in the overlay nav bar (Tailwind class, e.g., 'text-pink-300')

props.name: fixedTop
props.description: If true, header is fixed to the top of the viewport

props.name: showHamburger
props.description: If true, shows a hamburger menu button on the right side

props.name: loginForm
props.type: { usernameLabel?: string; usernamePlaceholder?: string; passwordLabel?: string; passwordPlaceholder?: string; buttonLabel?: string; buttonColor?: string; }
props.description: Optional login form displayed on the right side

props.name: selectOptions
props.description: Optional select dropdown options displayed in hero

props.name: selectLabel
props.description: Label for the select dropdown

HeroCarousel.description: HeroCarousel Component - Full-screen background slideshow with content.

props.name: slides
props.type: Array<{ heading: string; subheading?: string; image: string; action?: { label: string; href: string }; }>

ListingGrid.description: ListingGrid Component - Displays a grid of items with metadata (e.g., properties, products). Ideal for real estate, e-commerce, or directory sites.

props.name: id
props.description: Optional ID for anchor linking

props.name: heading
props.description: Section heading

props.name: subheading
props.description: Section subheading

props.name: variant
props.description: Layout variant

props.name: layout
props.description: Layout arrangement: 'grid' for card grid (default), 'list' for full-width stacked rows

props.name: columns
props.description: Number of columns for grid (md and up)

props.name: sidebar
props.type: { title?: string; sections?: Array<{ title: string; items: Array<{ label: string; href?: string; }>; }>; categories?: Array<{ label: string; href: string; count?: number; }>; filters?: Array<{ label: string; options: string[]; }>; }
props.description: Generic grouped list sections (e.g., contact info, service lists)

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Background color for the outer section (Tailwind class, e.g., 'bg-gray-100')

props.name: backgroundImage
props.description: Background image URL for the outer section (e.g., 'https://example.com/bg.jpg')

props.name: textColor
props.description: Text color for headings and labels (Tailwind class, e.g., 'text-white')

props.name: align
props.description: Text alignment for heading and subheading: 'center' (default), 'left', or 'right'

props.name: showSearch
props.description: Whether to show a search bar above the grid

props.name: searchPlaceholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the search bar

props.name: searchFields
props.description: Input type (default: 'text')

props.name: searchButtonLabel
props.description: Label for the search submit button shown alongside searchFields (default: 'Search')

props.name: items
props.type: Array<{ title: string; description?: string; price?: string; image: string; alt?: string; href?: string; tags?: string[]; }>
props.description: Array of tags or badges (e.g., ["3 Bed", "2 Bath"])

Navbar.description: Navbar Component - A horizontal navigation bar with links.

props.name: siteName
props.description: Brand/site name displayed on the left side of the navbar

props.name: logo
props.type: { src: string; alt?: string; size?: string; }
props.description: Tailwind height class, e.g. 'h-10' or 'h-12'

props.name: links
props.type: Array<{ label: string; href: string; dropdown?: Array<{ label: string; href: string; }>; }>
props.description: Array of navigation links

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Tailwind background color class

props.name: textColor
props.description: Tailwind text color class

props.name: linkColor
props.description: Tailwind text color class applied to the nav links (defaults to inheriting textColor)

props.name: align
props.description: Alignment of links: 'left', 'center', or 'right'

props.name: sticky
props.description: If true, the navbar will stick to the top on scroll

props.name: fixedTop
props.description: If true, the navbar will be fixed to the top of the viewport

props.name: fixedBottom
props.description: If true, the navbar will be fixed to the bottom of the viewport

props.name: cta
props.description: Optional CTA button shown at the far right of the navbar

props.name: showSearch
props.description: If true, show a search input on the right side of the navbar

props.name: searchPlaceholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the search input

props.name: searchButtonLabel
props.description: Label for the search submit button (default: "Search")

props.name: backgroundImage
props.description: Background image URL — renders as a full-cover background behind the navbar

props.name: showHamburger
props.description: If true, shows a hamburger menu button on the right side

NewsGrid.description: NewsGrid Component - Displays multiple columns of news or content articles. Each column has a heading and contains a list of article cards. Optionally renders a sidebar (e.g. category list) to the left of the grid.

props.name: id
props.description: Optional anchor id for in-page links (e.g. href="#news")

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Background color for the outer section (Tailwind class, e.g. 'bg-gray-100')

props.name: textColor
props.description: Text color for headings and labels (Tailwind class, e.g. 'text-white')

props.name: heading
props.description: Overall section heading displayed above the columns

props.name: subheading
props.description: Supporting description shown below the section heading

props.name: columns
props.description: Number of columns in the news grid area

props.name: align
props.description: Text alignment for heading and subheading: 'center' (default), 'left', or 'right'

props.name: sidebar
props.description: List of sidebar item labels

props.name: sections
props.type: Array<{ heading: string; articles: Array<{ title: string; description?: string; image?: { src: string; alt: string }; action?: { label: string; href: string }; }>; }>
props.description: Array of column sections, each with a heading and articles

Newsletter.description: Newsletter Component - A simple lead capture form for mailing lists. Typically used in the footer area or as a call-to-action section. NOTE: this component collects an email address ONLY. If the request asks for any additional named field (e.g. first name, last name, phone), use the ContactForm component with a `fields` array instead — Newsletter cannot render extra fields.

props.name: id
props.description: Optional anchor id for in-page links (e.g. href="#signup")

props.name: heading
props.description: The main title for the newsletter (e.g., "Join our newsletter")

props.name: subheading
props.description: Supporting text (e.g., "Stay updated with our latest collections")

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the email input field

props.name: buttonLabel
props.description: Label for the submit button

props.name: image
props.description: Optional image for split layout

props.name: layout
props.description: Layout style: 'stacked' (default) or 'split' (image on left, form on right)

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Background color (Tailwind class, e.g., 'bg-indigo-600')

props.name: textColor
props.description: Base text color for headings and body text (Tailwind class, e.g., 'text-white'). Use when backgroundColor is dark.

props.name: buttonColor
props.description: Button color (Tailwind class, e.g., 'bg-pink-500'). Defaults to inheriting from section styling.

Parallax.description: Parallax Component - A multi-layer parallax scroll effect section. Ideal for creating depth and visual interest with layered content.

props.name: id
props.description: Optional ID for anchor linking

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Background color for the outer section (Tailwind class)

props.name: textColor
props.description: Text color for the section (Tailwind class)

props.name: layers
props.type: Array<{ content: string; depth?: number; heading?: string; color?: string; fontSize?: string; }>
props.description: Font size for the content (Tailwind class, e.g., 'text-xl', 'text-2xl')

props.name: minHeight
props.description: Minimum height for the parallax section (Tailwind class, default: 'min-h-96')

props.name: id
props.description: Optional anchor id for in-page links (e.g. href="#pricing")

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Background color for the outer section (Tailwind class, e.g., 'bg-gray-100')

props.name: textColor
props.description: Text color for heading and subheading (Tailwind class, e.g., 'text-white'). Use when backgroundColor is dark.

props.name: align
props.description: Text alignment for heading and subheading: 'center' (default), 'left', or 'right'

props.name: plans
props.type: Array<{ name: string; price: string; period?: string; description?: string; features: string[]; ctaLabel: string; ctaHref: string; highlighted?: boolean; }>

Sidebar.description: Sidebar Component - A three-column layout with optional left and right sidebars. Ideal for pages with search/navigation sidebars and main content with supplementary content.

props.name: id
props.description: Optional anchor id for in-page links

props.name: logo
props.description: Optional logo displayed centered at the top

props.name: heading
props.description: Main section heading

props.name: subheading
props.description: Main section subheading

props.name: links
props.description: Navigation links rendered as a horizontal nav bar (e.g., for service categories)

props.name: linkColor
props.description: Text color for navigation links (Tailwind class, e.g., 'text-yellow-500')

props.name: paragraphs
props.description: Optional paragraphs of body text rendered in the main content area

props.name: leftSidebar
props.type: { title?: string; image?: { src: string; alt: string; }; content?: string; sections?: Array<{ title: string; content: string; }>; links?: Array<{ label: string; href: string; }>; showSearch?: boolean; searchPlaceholder?: string; action?: { label: string; href: string; variant?: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'success'; }; backgroundColor?: string; textColor?: string; }
props.description: Optional CTA button rendered below the links

props.name: rightSidebar
props.type: { title?: string; images?: Array<{ src: string; alt: string; caption?: string; }>; sections?: Array<{ title: string; content: string; }>; links?: Array<{ label: string; href: string; }>; showSearch?: boolean; searchPlaceholder?: string; searchButtonLabel?: string; newsletter?: { heading?: string; placeholder?: string; buttonLabel?: string; buttonColor?: string; }; form?: { fields: Array<{ label: string; type: 'text' | 'email' | 'textarea' | 'password' | 'select' | 'date' | 'time' | 'number'; required?: boolean; placeholder?: string; options?: string[]; }>; buttonLabel?: string; buttonColor?: string; }; backgroundColor?: string; textColor?: string; actionTitle?: string; action?: { label: string; href: string; variant?: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'success'; }; }
props.description: Optional CTA button rendered at the bottom of the right sidebar

props.name: articles
props.type: Array<{ title?: string; id?: string; description?: string; bulletPoints?: string[]; image?: { src: string; alt: string; }; backgroundColor?: string; textColor?: string; action?: { label: string; href: string; variant?: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'success'; }; actions?: Array<{ label: string; href: string; variant?: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'success'; }>; }>
props.description: Multiple CTA buttons rendered below the description (use instead of action for 2+ buttons)

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Background color for outer section

props.name: textColor
props.description: Text color for content

props.name: backgroundImage
props.description: Background image URL — creates a full-cover background with a subtle overlay

props.name: action
props.description: Optional CTA button rendered below the articles

Table.description: Table Component - Displays structured tabular data with optional search and filtering. Ideal for food menus, product catalogs, pricing tables, or any structured dataset.

props.name: heading

props.name: subheading
props.description: Section subheading

props.name: columns

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Background color for the outer section (Tailwind class, e.g., 'bg-white')

props.name: backgroundImage
props.description: Background image URL for the outer section

props.name: textColor
props.description: Text color for headings and content (Tailwind class, e.g., 'text-white')

props.name: align
props.description: Text alignment for heading and subheading: 'left' (default), 'center', or 'right'

props.name: headerBackgroundColor
props.description: Header background color (Tailwind class, e.g., 'bg-gray-100')

props.name: rowHoverColor
props.description: Hover row background color (Tailwind class)

props.description: Max width constraint (Tailwind class, e.g., 'max-w-4xl')

props.name: card

props.name: cardBackgroundColor

Team.description: Team Component - Showcases key staff members or contributors. Use this to build trust and humanize the brand.

props.name: id
props.description: Optional ID for anchor linking

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Background color for the outer section (Tailwind class, e.g., 'bg-white')

props.name: textColor
props.description: Base text color for heading and body text (Tailwind class, e.g., 'text-white')

props.name: align
props.description: Horizontal alignment of the section header: 'center' (default), 'left', or 'right'

props.name: columns
props.description: Number of columns in the grid layout (2, 3, or 4; default: 4)

props.name: heading
props.description: Section heading

props.name: subheading
props.description: Supporting description

props.name: members
props.type: Array<{ name: string; role: string; bio?: string; avatar?: string; }>
props.description: URL to the member's profile picture

props.name: id
props.description: Optional anchor id for in-page links (e.g. href="#testimonials")

props.name: subheading
props.description: Supporting description shown below the heading

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Background color for the outer section (Tailwind class, e.g. 'bg-white')

props.name: textColor
props.description: Base text color applied to heading and subheading (Tailwind class, e.g. 'text-white'). Use when backgroundColor is dark.

props.name: headingColor
props.description: Override color for the section heading only (Tailwind class, e.g. 'text-red-600'). Takes precedence over textColor for the h2 element.

props.name: layout
props.description: Layout variant: 'grid' for card grid (default), 'split' for left-text right-image

props.name: columns
props.description: Number of columns in the card grid (default: 3). Only applies when layout='grid'.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Tailwind max-width class constraining the inner content container (e.g. 'max-w-2xl', 'max-w-4xl'). Defaults to 'max-w-7xl'.

props.name: align
props.description: Text alignment for heading and subheading: 'center' (default), 'left', or 'right'

props.name: testimonials
props.type: Array<{ quote: string; author: string; role?: string; avatar?: string; image?: { src: string; alt: string; }; }>
